briefdescription.para: Main Graph class for building and executing deep learning operations.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains the Graph class, which is the primary interface for users to construct computational graphs of deep learning operations and execute them on AMD GPUs via the hipDNN backend.

sect1.title: Overview
sect1.para:
The Graph class provides a fluent API for:
Creating tensors with specified dimensions and data types
Adding operations (convolution, batch normalization, pointwise, matmul)
Building and executing plans on GPU
